calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Leilan D Kiin.

Dept. 505; Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:56 am and concluding at 10:56 am and concluding at 11:06 am.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. is represented by John Vaknin, Esq.
Defendant Leilan D Kiin is not present.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Sherri Griffin
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE

Plaintiff makes oral motion to dismiss doe defendants

The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's oral motion to dismiss doe defendants.

Matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. and against Defendant Leilan D Kiin as follows:

Damages: $15,284.53
Costs:$535.23

Total Judgment: $15,819.76

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.(D505)
